raw_action_dict.reasoning: Waypoint delta is +48° (target nearly due east at y≈0.68, car heading -53°), so strong left steering at speed 1.0 is needed to align with the long eastward straight ahead.
knowledge: After waypoint 108, track runs nearly due east at y≈0.68 — long straight ahead
Car heading is around -53° but track is nearly 0° (east) — need sustained left steering to align
Positive delta = steer left (positive steering_angle), negative = steer right
At delta +30-50°, use steering_angle=+20 at speed 1.0
Car is left of center (0.17m) — within safe bounds at track width 0.75m
Waypoints 108-119 all at y≈0.68, x increasing — long eastward straight
Oversteer warning: once delta drops below 10°, reduce to smallest valid angle immediately
Previous +20° steering at speed 1.0 was correct — continue same action until delta shrinks
Watch for transition: once heading reaches ~0°, reduce steering to avoid oscillation
Car is slowly turning left but heading still very negative — need more turns at +20°
